h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps white text on a black background. The word 'COPYRIGHT' is significantly larger than the introductory phrase.
h1.example_text: 10 THINGS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT COPYRIGHT

h2.visual_description: Bold, all-caps white text centered within a colored rectangular banner (green for the left column, blue for the right).
h2.example_text: COPYRIGHT PROTECTS CREATIVE WORK — YOURS, MINE, EVERYONE'S!

visual_matchers.pattern: Large white numeral inside a colored square box (green or blue)
Line-art icon positioned below a numbered box
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Thematic visual aid for the adjacent text block

visual_matchers.pattern: Text color (green or blue) matching the column's header banner
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Thematic grouping of content under a specific category

visual_matchers.pattern: Vertical lines with circular nodes connecting white text boxes
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Visual flow indicating a sequence or relationship between points

markdown_grammar.table_style: html (recommended to preserve the two-column grid layout of information cards)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top: Title block and media type icons. Bottom: Website URL, logo, and QR code.
